name: CM_ANIM_DIGIT
description: Animated single digit component with vertical slide transitions. Shows current digit with smooth slide animation when value changes (667ms ease-in-out). Direction determines slide up or down. Supports negative values (displays hyphen). Uses 87px font with 85px cell height.
visualForm: Single digit cell (85px height) with translating number that slides vertically when changing, three-slot animation system (previous/current/next)
descriptionKo: 세로 슬라이드 전환 애니메이션이 있는 단일 숫자 컴포넌트입니다. 값 변경 시 667ms ease-in-out 애니메이션으로 숫자가 위/아래로 슬라이드하며 전환됩니다. 87px 폰트와 85px 셀 높이를 사용합니다.
descriptionEn: Animated single digit component with vertical slide transitions. Shows current digit with smooth slide animation when value changes (667ms ease-in-out). Direction determines slide up or down. Supports negative values (displays hyphen). Uses 87px font with 85px cell height.
